identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Create a high-performance, minimalist operational dashboard that outperforms spreadsheets in speed and clarity.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Notion's clarity with Linear's efficiency.
Content is King: The schedule IS the content. Maximize screen real estate for the grid.
Zoom In: Use bold focus states for selected appointments.
Negative Space: Use whitespace to separate days and teams, not heavy borders.
Contrast: Use color ONLY for status and action. Everything else is monochrome.

rules: Never use pure black (#000000). Use Slate-900 (#0F172A).
Use status colors sparingly. The UI should be 90% monochrome.
Interactive elements must have a hover state that is slightly lighter/darker.
Shadows should be soft and diffuse (shadow-sm, shadow-md).

grid_system.calendar_header: flex items-center justify-between px-6 py-4 border-b border-border bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md sticky top-0 z-10
grid_system.sidebar: w-64 flex-shrink-0 border-r border-border bg-background h-screen sticky top-0

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-9 px-4 rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-ring
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 h-9 px-4 rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-9 px-4 rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors
buttons.outline: border border-input bg-background hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-9 px-4 rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors

cards.interactive: rounded-lg border bg-card text-card-foreground shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow cursor-pointer

inputs.base: flex h-9 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-transparent px-3 py-1 text-sm shadow-sm transition-colors file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

calendar.slot: border-b border-r border-border/50 h-20 min-w-[150px] relative hover:bg-accent/30 transition-colors group
calendar.event_card: absolute inset-x-1 rounded px-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium border-l-4 shadow-sm cursor-pointer hover:brightness-95 transition-all truncate

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Manrope' for all headings and 'Inter' for body text. Import them via Google Fonts in index.css.
Implement the 'Control Room' grid for the main dashboard view.
The Calendar component is the core. It must be custom-built using CSS Grid or a library like 'react-big-calendar' styled to match the guidelines.
Use Shadcn/UI components for all interactive elements (Dialogs, Dropdowns, Forms).
Ensure the 'Status' colors are applied consistently across the app (badges, borders, calendar events).
The sidebar should be collapsible to maximize the calendar view.
Use the provided image URLs for user avatars in the mockups.
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for backgrounds. Keep it flat and clean.
Use whitespace generously. Don't crowd the interface.
Ensure high contrast for text readability (WCAG AA).
All inputs and buttons must have clear focus states.
